name: idealweddings-complete-deployment
description: Ideal Weddings Complete Deployment with Dependencies

scripts.build:backend: npm run build:auth && npm run build:vendor && npm run build:quote && npm run build:guest && npm run build:credit && npm run build:gateway
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.start:backend: concurrently "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:vendor" "npm run start:quote" "npm run start:guest" "npm run start:credit" "npm run start:gateway"
